title: JSON schema for using the MetadataGen API just for suggestions of the optional attributes
description: This schema specifies the JSON format that an JSON file in the HTTP POST request body must contain to use MetadataGen. This simplified schema can only be used with the "/suggestion" route and only returns the suggestions for keywords, educationalAlignment, teaches and educationalLevel attribute.
